incidents.justification: The chatbot confidently fabricated a non existent discount policy, producing false information that users relied on, making it primarily a failure of reliability caused by hallucination
The system collected and stored sensitive employee and client information without users' knowledge or consent, violating privacy
The AI-generated video falsely appeared authentic, misleading the public because its artificial origin was not transparent
The model indirectly discriminated against applicants using a proxy for gender, leading to unfair hiring decisions
Harmful automated decisions continued unchecked because no human monitored or reviewed the system's behavior
AI-generated voice impersonation was used to deceive employees and compromise financial security

stretch_notes: Clearview AI scraped billions of publicly available photos from social media and websites without users' consent to build a facial recognition database, leading to lawsuits, regulatory fines, and privacy concerns over the unauthorized collection and use of personal biometric data
